mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_wem_plan ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_wem_plan WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_wem_plan WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wem_plan (plan_year, process_name, department, hazard_type, measurement_cycle, last_measurement_date, next_measurement_date, status, measurement_agency, agency_code, contract_period, remarks, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{planYear}, #{processName}, #{department}, #{hazardType}, #{measurementCycle}, #{lastMeasurementDate}, #{nextMeasurementDate}, #{status}, #{measurementAgency}, #{agencyCode}, #{contractPeriod}, #{remarks}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wem_plan SET plan_year = #{planYear}, process_name = #{processName}, department = #{department}, hazard_type = #{hazardType}, measurement_cycle = #{measurementCycle}, last_measurement_date = #{lastMeasurementDate}, next_measurement_date = #{nextMeasurementDate}, status = #{status}, measurement_agency = #{measurementAgency}, agency_code = #{agencyCode}, contract_period = #{contractPeriod}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
